NMF AnyTextGen 3.0.1.1+12c453bc70751ccb39e6612370b89dabb3132969
Copyright © Georg Hinkel 2024

  generate-metamodel    Generates a metamodel from an AnyText specification

  generate-parser       Generates a parser for an AnyText specification

  generate-code         Generates metamodel code from an AnyText specification
                        or NMeta metamodel, specified in XMI or AnyMeta

  help                  Display more information on a specific command.

result.stderr:
NMF AnyTextGen 3.0.1.1+12c453bc70751ccb39e6612370b89dabb3132969
Copyright © Georg Hinkel 2024

  -n, --namespace             The namespace of the generated parser class

  -x, --save-metamodel-xmi    If set, the metamodel is kept in XMI format. This
                              flag is ignored if the input is specified as XMI
                              file.

  -i, --identifierNames       A list of identifier names, multiple entries
                              separated by ';'. If omitted, attributes named
                              'name' or 'id' (case-insensitive) will be assumed
                              to be identifiers. Ignored if the source is not an
                              AnyText file.

  -g, --global-identifiers    If set, AnyText uses global identifiers instead of
                              local identifiers

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.

  value pos. 0                Required. The path to the AnyText specification

  value pos. 1                Required. The output path.
